_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop contract language to ensure supply chain, system, network, and operational security are met.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model adoption, fine-tuning pipeline integrity, third-party dataset provenance, and model registry security controls.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-010 (OP, cosine: 0.468), RM-T-008 (RM, cosine: 0.466).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.5/10 (raw 0.349). Shared vocabulary: [chain, security, supply]. DCWF-only terms [contract, develop, ensure, language, met, network] vs WIDAI-only terms [adoption, controls, dataset, fine, integrity, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.888, R=0.867). P exceeds R by 0.021 — the DCWF element's 14 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Develop contract language to ensure supply chain, system, network, and operation" and "Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.488 > STS 0.349 (gap +0.139). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [chain, security, supply] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.1%. Shared tokens: [chain, security, supply]. DCWF-only: [contract, develop, ensure, language, met, network]. WIDAI-only: [adoption, controls, dataset, fine, integrity, knowledge].
